name: Beans Peas Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 cup dry, uncooked red (kidney) beans, soaked overnight or 1 can canned kidney (or red) beans, drained and rinsed (~16 oz)
2 cups pasta (rainbow whole wheat elbows), uncooked
recipeInstructions:
1. If using dry beans, soak them in water overnight and drain. Cook the beans in 1 quart of fresh water for 2 hours, checking occasionally after the first hour to ensure they don't overcook.
2. Drain the cooked beans.
3. Cook the pasta in salted water according to package instructions, then drain and chill in cold water.
4. Combine the beans, cooled pasta, and peas in a large bowl. Add olive oil, white wine vinegar, lemon juice, salt, pepper, oregano, and sugar.
5. Toss until well combined.
6. Garnish with parsley.
Serves 6-8 people.
